message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have noted that you are not able to pay this month. To continue, please verify your identity using the minimum partial identifier on file for this account.
It’s Neha Verma, and I still can’t pay right now since I’m out of work.

Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship. To verify this account, please confirm the phone number ending in 0002. After that, I need one routing detail: do you expect any income within 21 days?
Yes, that’s my number ending in 0002. I’m unemployed right now, so I don’t know if I’ll have any income in the next 21 days.
Identity verification is complete. I have noted ongoing hardship and no expected income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Okay, but I still can’t pay anything right now, so a call won’t change that.

Based on what you've already shared, no live payment arrangement fits Slice policy because you cannot commit to any payment within 21 days. The only available next step is hardship review. If you want, I can note that you only want contact if an approved hardship option or other approved arrangement becomes available.
Yes, note that—I don’t have any payment to offer right now.

Understood. I’ve noted that you do not have any payment to offer right now and that you only want contact if an approved hardship option or other approved arrangement becomes available. There is no live payment arrangement to set today.

Understood. I’ve noted ongoing hardship and that you cannot commit to any payment at this time. There is no approved hardship option available right now. Per your request, you will be contacted only if an approved hardship option or other approved arrangement becomes available.
